home_read.momentum: No punditry on Scotland is provided in the text, so no structured read is supported.

tactical_shape: Ancelotti is expected to use Neymar as a false nine if he features, so as not to have so many marking assignments
Vinícius Júnior and Rodrygo were used as wide attackers in a system with Cunha dropping deep, allowing the two wingers to play as strikers
Brazil improved defensively against Haiti, keeping a clean sheet
standout_players: Vinícius Júnior saved Brazil with a moment of individual brilliance against Morocco and has two goals and an assist at the tournament
Casemiro is portrayed as a key figure but with critics questioning the midfield's mobility
Matheus Cunha scored twice against Haiti
Neymar remains the biggest-name talking point, though pundits question his fitness and form
fatigue_injuries: Neymar has been out with a calf strain / injury layoff and has not played a minute at the tournament
Raphinha picked up a hamstring injury against Haiti
Rodrygo is missing the entire tournament
There are concerns Neymar lacks rhythm and physical condition after a long layoff
away_read.momentum: Brazil arrive under scrutiny and with little public faith at home; pundits think they are still short of convincing World Cup form and may need to improve during the tournament.
